channel.title: lambda on Abhishek's blog
channel.description: Recent content in lambda on Abhishek's blog

item.title: Using AWS Lambda Function URL to build a Serverless backend for Slack
item.description: Originally posted on https://itnext.io/using-aws-lambda-function-url-to-build-a-serverless-backend-for-slack-a292ef355a5d A combination of AWS Lambda and Amazon API Gateway is a widely-used architecture for serverless microservices and API based solutions.
